_primary_source: Primary source: (Fink, 1992) DOI 10.1109/58.156174 (time reversal of ultrasonic fields; time-reversal mirror refocusing through inhomogeneous media); (Yariv, 1978) DOI 10.1109/JQE.1978.1069870 (phase conjugation). Time reversal refocuses on the source through the scattering medium.
title: QA_TIME_REVERSAL_FOCUS_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Time-Reversal Focusing Cert [522]. 'mechanism' fixtures certify focus/medium-cancellation/off-source-scatter/same-medium-specificity on explicit small arrays; 'empirical' fixtures record the reference-impl results.

prop_to_source.description: mechanism: per-element propagation phase to the source location

prop_to_off.description: mechanism: per-element propagation phase to a distinct off-source location

medium_alt.description: mechanism: a distinct medium H' (re-emitting through it must break the focus)

peak_focus.description: empirical: peak coherent-sum focus magnitude (~1 at the source)

source_recovered.description: empirical: focus peak lands at the source location
